title: Reported Speech: He said that...
description: She said she was tired. Cómo reportar lo que alguien dijo. Los tiempos retroceden un paso — el error clásico es olvidar el backshift.

items.front: Reported Speech (Introduction) (He said (that) + subject + past verb)
items.explanation: Para reportar lo que alguien dijo, los tiempos verbales retroceden: present simple → past simple, past simple → past perfect, will → would, can → could. 'That' es opcional después de 'said'.

cardRef.front: Reported Speech (Introduction) (He said (that) + subject + past verb)

items.front: "I am tired." → She said she was tired.
items.back: "Estoy cansada." → Ella dijo que estaba cansada.
items.explanation: Backshift: present simple 'am' → past simple 'was'. El sujeto también cambia: 'I' → 'she'. 'That' es opcional: 'She said (that) she was tired.' Las comillas desaparecen en discurso indirecto.

items.front: "I will come." → He told me he would come.
items.back: "Voy a venir." → Me dijo que vendría.
items.explanation: Backshift: 'will' → 'would'. 'Told' lleva complemento indirecto (told ME, told her). 'Said' NO lleva complemento directo sin 'to': 'He said to me he would come' o 'He told me he would come'.

items.front: "I can drive." → She said she could drive.
items.back: "Sé manejar." → Ella dijo que sabía manejar.
items.explanation: Backshift: modal 'can' → 'could'. Otros modales: will→would, shall→should, may→might. 'Must' → 'must' o 'had to' dependiendo del contexto.

steps.title: Reportar lo que alguien dijo
steps.instruction: Cuando repetís lo que alguien dijo, los tiempos verbales retroceden un paso. Directo: 'I AM tired' → Indirecto: She said she WAS tired. Es como si el pasado 'empujara' el tiempo un escalón atrás. Importante: 'say' no necesita complemento, 'tell' sí necesita persona: 'tell me', 'tell her'.

steps.title: ¿Cuál es la forma indirecta?
steps.instruction: Elegí la versión correcta de discurso indirecto.

steps.title: Transformá a discurso indirecto
steps.instruction: Completá la oración en discurso indirecto.

exercises.template: Direct: "I work in a bank." → Reported: She said she {0} in a bank.
Direct: "I will call you." → Reported: He told me he {0} call me.

steps.title: Errores en discurso indirecto
steps.instruction: Identificá si la oración en discurso indirecto está correcta.

exercises.explanation: Backshift obligatorio: present simple 'is' → past simple 'was'. En discurso indirecto los tiempos retroceden.

exercises.sentence: He told me he was tired.
exercises.explanation: Correcta. Backshift: 'is' → 'was'. Y 'told' con complemento indirecto 'me'. Todo correcto.

exercises.sentence: She said to me she could help.
exercises.explanation: Correcta. 'Said to me' con 'to' o 'told me' (sin to). Backshift: can → could. Perfecta.

exercises.sentence: They said they will come tomorrow.
exercises.correction: They said they would come the next day.
exercises.explanation: Backshift: 'will' → 'would'. Además, 'tomorrow' cambia a 'the next day' (las referencias de tiempo también cambian en discurso indirecto).

steps.title: ¡Lección completa!
steps.instruction: Discurso indirecto: los tiempos retroceden. am/is/are → was/were. was/were → had been. will → would. can → could. 'Said' (sin complemento) vs 'told' (con complemento: told me, told her). 'That' es opcional. Las referencias de tiempo también cambian: today→that day, tomorrow→the next day, yesterday→the day before.
